evidence.scientific_clarity: All three numbered equations (ELBO, decomposition, retrieval-augmented) are present with explanatory prose and cross-references via \eqref; derivation chain is clear and complete.
evidence.typography: Latin Modern fonts (LMRoman, LMMathItalic, LMMathSymbols) embedded as Type 1 subsets; no DejaVu Sans; proper italic variables and upright operators throughout.
evidence.palette: Monochrome text/equation figure with no color; no directional/categorical color misuse possible; clean black-on-white rendering.
evidence.layout_density: Full letter page (612x792 pts, 1275x1650 px PNG at 150dpi) with content filling only the top ~60%; pdfcrop did not reduce to content bbox, leaving noticeable blank lower portion.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption correctly describes all three equations; cross-references and prose match figure content; however, required equations.tex source file is absent from deliverables.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF produced by pdfTeX-1.40.29 with all 14 font subsets embedded as Type 1; text is fully selectable; genuine vector document.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py are all present and non-trivial; equations.tex (explicitly required by brief) is missing.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption identifies each equation's role (ELBO, decomposition, retrieval conditioning) with mathematical notation, but contains no quantitative claim or specific numerical finding about model performance.

overall_strengths: Rigorous, complete LaTeX derivation with proper align environments, numbered equations, \label/\eqref cross-references, and explanatory interstitial prose matching the brief exactly.
Excellent typographic quality: Latin Modern math fonts, all subsets embedded, genuine pdfTeX vector PDF with selectable text — no matplotlib font pitfalls.
overall_weaknesses: equations.tex source file is missing from the working directory despite being explicitly required by the brief, making the derivation non-reproducible from source.
PDF/PNG retain full letter-page blank space below content (pdfcrop either was unavailable or ineffective), reducing layout density; a cropped output would better serve journal submission.
